faqs.question: Is parking available at the venue?
faqs.answer: Yes, free parking is available for 20+ vehicles at the venue.

faqs.question: Do I need to wear sports shoes?
faqs.answer: Yes, sports shoes are mandatory for safety. Footwear with spikes or heels is not allowed on the turf.

faqs.question: Is outside food allowed?
faqs.answer: Outside food is not allowed inside the playing area. We have a food stall with snacks and beverages available.

faqs.question: What is the cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: Cancellations made 24 hours before the slot get a full refund. Cancellations within 24 hours get 50% refund. No refund for no-shows.

faqs.question: Is advance booking required?
faqs.answer: Yes, advance booking is required. Walk-in availability depends on current slot status. We recommend booking at least 1 day in advance.

faqs.question: Can I rent equipment?
faqs.answer: Yes! We provide cricket bats, balls, stumps, pads, gloves, football, and badminton rackets on rent. Ask our staff for details.

faqs.question: Is the venue open on holidays?
faqs.answer: Yes, Eagle Box Cricket is open all 7 days including public holidays, from 6 AM to 11 PM.

faqs.question: Do you have floodlights for night games?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have full floodlight facilities so you can play comfortably even after sunset.

faqs.question: How many players can play at once?
faqs.answer: Each session supports up to 12 players. For larger groups or tournaments, please contact us directly.

faqs.question: Is smoking allowed at the venue?
faqs.answer: No. Smoking and alcohol are strictly prohibited inside the venue premises.

faqs.question: What payment methods are accepted?
faqs.answer: We accept cash, UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), and bank transfers. Online payment links can be shared on request.

faqs.question: How do I confirm my booking?
faqs.answer: Once you share your details, our team will contact you within 30 minutes to confirm the slot and share the payment link.

faqs.question: Are there changing rooms available?
faqs.answer: Yes, clean changing rooms and washrooms are available for players.

faqs.question: Do you support birthday parties or corporate events?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We offer special packages for birthday parties, corporate team outings, and group events. Contact us for custom quotes.

faqs.question: What is the turf size?
faqs.answer: Our box cricket turf is 30ft x 60ft. Football turf is full size. All turfs are made with high-quality artificial grass.
